entries.summary: Review the bounded Phase 4 closeout-tracking entry package, confirm the public planning parity and closeout result-contract guardrails, and decide whether one bounded closeout tracker-refresh slice may begin.

entries.title: Implement structural rewrite Phase 4 closeout tracking refresh boundary
entries.summary: Route the remaining PRD, decision, and design tracking refresh step in InitiativeCloseoutService through one private closeout-local boundary after the approved shared closeout seam while keeping the closeout result contract explicit.

entries.title: Review structural rewrite Phase 4 closeout tracking refresh boundary outcome
entries.summary: Review the bounded Phase 4 closeout-tracking refresh-boundary slice, confirm the approved private tracker seam held parity and result-contract boundaries, and decide whether broader rewrite work remains blocked or may proceed only through one new explicit checkpoint.

entries.title: Review structural rewrite Phase 4 shared projection entry package
entries.summary: Review the bounded Phase 4 shared-projection entry package, confirm the public planning parity and private-graph guardrails, and decide whether bounded Phase 4 work may begin.

entries.title: Implement structural rewrite Phase 4 planning projection snapshot
entries.summary: Introduce one private trace-scoped planning projection snapshot behind initiative-index and planning-catalog sync without changing the public planning-authority boundary.

entries.title: Review structural rewrite Phase 4 planning projection snapshot outcome
entries.summary: Review the bounded Phase 4 planning projection snapshot slice, confirm the shared private snapshot held public planning parity, and decide whether broader rewrite work remains blocked or may proceed to a new bounded checkpoint.

entries.title: Bootstrap Summary Surface Retirement planning chain
entries.summary: Bootstraps the initial planning chain for Summary Surface Retirement.

entries.title: Retire SUMMARY.md and direct dependency surfaces
entries.summary: Delete SUMMARY.md, remove the dedicated summary-continuity trace, and rewrite remaining repo-local references so no active surface depends on the retired summary entrypoint.

entries.title: Validate and close summary surface retirement
entries.summary: Run targeted and full validation, refresh evidence, rerun confirmation passes, and close the summary-retirement slice.

entries.title: Bootstrap Task Query Dependency Lookup Hardening planning chain
entries.summary: Bootstraps the initial planning chain for Task Query Dependency Lookup Hardening.

entries.title: Optimize task query dependency lookups
entries.summary: Skip reverse-dependency recomputation when dependency details are not requested and batch the detailed path through one precomputed reverse-dependency map.

entries.title: Validate and close task query dependency lookup hardening
entries.summary: Run the measured validation baseline, refresh evidence, complete the stop-condition review, and close the trace once task-query dependency lookup hardening lands cleanly.

entries.title: Bootstrap Task Sync Disappearing File Resilience planning chain
entries.summary: Bootstraps the initial planning chain for Task Sync Disappearing File Resilience.

entries.title: Harden task sync iteration against disappearing files
entries.summary: Make shared task iteration skip vanished task files during live task moves while preserving validation for the surviving task set.

entries.title: Validate and close task sync disappearing-file resilience
entries.summary: Run regression coverage, full repository validation, and the follow-up orchestration review pass before trace closeout.

entries.title: Bootstrap the template and output efficiency initiative
entries.summary: Create the traced planning chain, acceptance baseline, and bounded task set for compact template and tracker work.

entries.title: Define compact authoring rules and align governed templates
entries.summary: Add the compact-authoring standard, align templates with governed outputs, and relax low-value required sections without weakening machine-readable authority.

entries.title: Compact generated planning tracker outputs
entries.summary: Make generated planning trackers denser and more scan-friendly by removing low-value filler while preserving the routing value of the human-readable view.

entries.title: Tighten workflow guidance for proportional output
entries.summary: Update planning and documentation workflow modules so they prefer the smallest useful output and stop encouraging low-value meta content.

entries.title: Bootstrap Typed Query Surface Modularity Hardening planning chain
entries.summary: Bootstraps the initial planning chain for Typed Query Surface Modularity Hardening.

entries.title: Split typed retrieval models into focused modules
entries.summary: Refactor the typed planning and documentation retrieval models into focused modules with explicit shared helpers while preserving stable public imports and loader or query behavior.

entries.title: Split CLI query regressions into focused suites
entries.summary: Replace the broad CLI query regression hotspot with narrower family-specific suites and shared command helpers while preserving real command coverage and JSON assertions.

entries.title: Validate and close typed query surface modularity hardening
entries.summary: Run targeted and full validation, repeat same-theme confirmation passes, refresh evidence, and close the typed retrieval modularity trace once the hotspot stays clean.

entries.title: Bootstrap Unit Test Hardening and Rebalancing planning chain
entries.summary: Bootstraps the initial planning chain for Unit Test Hardening and Rebalancing.

entries.title: Harden command and lifecycle coverage
entries.summary: Add direct handler and service coverage for closeout, route, plan, task, query, and lifecycle behavior that current CLI smoke tests do not cover deeply enough.

entries.title: Harden GitHub integration and sync coverage
entries.summary: Add direct deterministic unit coverage for GitHub client behavior and GitHub task-sync write or failure paths.

entries.title: Expand orchestration and derivation failure coverage
entries.summary: Add meaningful failure and edge-state tests for aggregate sync, aggregate validation, initiative closeout, and derived coordination or initiative projections.

entries.title: Rebalance unit suite structure and docs
entries.summary: Split the oversized CLI test surface, add shared fixture support, and update unit-suite documentation to match the suite's actual boundary and contributor patterns.

entries.title: Bootstrap Validation Test Hotspot Rebalancing planning chain
entries.summary: Bootstraps the initial planning chain for Validation Test Hotspot Rebalancing.

entries.title: Split document-semantics hotspot into focused suites
entries.summary: Replace the remaining mixed-family document-semantics hotspot with focused suites, reusable fixture writers, and aligned unit-suite inventory coverage.

entries.title: Split integration validation hotspot into focused suites
entries.summary: Replace the remaining mixed-family integration validation hotspot with focused suites, small helpers, and aligned integration-suite inventory coverage.

entries.title: Validate and close validation test hotspot rebalancing
entries.summary: Run targeted and full validation, repeat same-theme confirmation passes, refresh evidence, and close the validation-hotspot trace once the split stays clean.

entries.title: Bootstrap Workflow Route Boundary Discoverability Hardening planning chain
entries.summary: Bootstraps the initial planning chain for Workflow Route Boundary Discoverability Hardening.

entries.title: Harden workflow route preview discrimination for adjacent routes
entries.summary: Improve route-preview matching and selection so realistic reconciliation prompts resolve correctly and low-signal route leakage is filtered without hiding intentional multi-route requests.

entries.title: Validate and close workflow route boundary discoverability hardening
entries.summary: Run targeted validation, full validation, repeated confirmation passes, evidence refresh, and terminal closeout once the workflow-boundary slice stays clean.

entries.title: Align workflow lookup metadata and boundary guidance
entries.summary: Refresh workflow trigger metadata, adjacent workflow guidance, command docs, and derived workflow-index surfaces so workflow lookup reinforces the same route boundaries as route preview.

entries.title: Bootstrap Workflow Routing Review Accuracy Alignment planning chain
entries.summary: Bootstraps the initial planning chain for Workflow Routing Review Accuracy Alignment.

entries.title: Harden workflow route scoring and review coverage
entries.summary: Tighten deterministic route-preview matching, curate the affected route rows, add explicit foundations-aware review coverage, and align the companion docs and tests.

entries.title: Validate and close workflow routing review alignment
entries.summary: Run the route-preview review sweep, repository validation baseline, and final no-new-issues pass before trace closeout.

entries.title: Bootstrap the workflow system operationalization initiative
entries.summary: Creates the traced planning chain, accepted direction, acceptance baseline, planning evidence, and bounded execution tasks for the workflow-system follow-up.

entries.title: Add compact planning scaffold commands
entries.summary: Expose lean CLI scaffolds for PRDs, feature designs, implementation plans, decisions, and initiative bootstrap using the current repo templates.

entries.title: Tighten reconciliation workflow decision guidance
entries.summary: Add compact decision support that distinguishes documentation, traceability, governed-artifact, and acceptance-evidence reconciliation routes.

entries.title: Add route preview and governed workflow metadata authority
entries.summary: Move workflow retrieval metadata into governed control-plane artifacts, add a derived route index, and expose executable route preview through the CLI.

entries.title: Add task lifecycle CLI commands
entries.summary: Expose task creation, structured task updates, and handoff-style transitions through a first-class CLI family while preserving task-document authority.
